docs.title: FastF1 Portfolio
docs.text: High-quality analyses and reusable helpers built on FastF1.

docs.title: How it works
docs.text:
• Caching: FastF1 cache at .fastf1/ (configurable).
  • Style: Centralized Matplotlib styling in plotting.py.
  • Loader: load_session(year, gp, session) for consistent data access.

docs.title: load_session(year, gp, session, *, cache='.fastf1')
docs.text:
Load a FastF1 session with optional local cache directory.

Source code in src/fastf1_portfolio/session_loader.py 
def load_session(year: int, gp: str, session: str, *, cache: str | None = ".fastf1"):
    """Load a FastF1 session with optional local cache directory."""
    if cache:
        cache_path = Path(cache)
        cache_path.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)  # ensure cache dir exists
        fastf1.Cache.enable_cache(str(cache_path))
    s = fastf1.get_session(year, gp, session)
    s.load()
    return s
